scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma build && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/openai build && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/cli build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma build && corepack pnpm -r run check
scripts.test:ts: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma test && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/openai test && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/cli test
scripts.examples:check: tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json && vitest run --config examples/vitest.config.ts examples/review_diff_decision.test.ts examples/tool_permission_workflow.test.ts examples/review_diff_contract.test.ts examples/review_diff_migration.test.ts examples/function_repair/repair_function_contract.test.ts examples/function_repair/repair_function_trace.test.ts && python -m py_compile examples/embedded_agent.py examples/review_diff_forma.py examples/review_diff_package.py examples/review_diff_lock_consumer.py examples/review_diff_decision.py examples/review_diff_contract/__init__.py examples/review_diff_contract_test.py examples/review_diff_inline.py examples/review_diff_migration_test.py examples/tool_permission_plan.py examples/tool_permission_workflow.py examples/function_repair/repair_function_forma.py examples/function_repair/repair_function_package.py examples/function_repair/repair_function_contract_test.py examples/function_repair/repair_function_trace_test.py && PYTHONPATH=examples python examples/review_diff_decision_test.py && PYTHONPATH=examples python examples/tool_permission_workflow_test.py && PYTHONPATH=examples python examples/review_diff_contract_test.py && PYTHONPATH=examples python examples/review_diff_migration_test.py && PYTHONPATH=examples/function_repair:packages/forma-python/src python examples/function_repair/repair_function_contract_test.py && PYTHONPATH=examples/function_repair:packages/forma-python/src python examples/function_repair/repair_function_trace_test.py
scripts.projects:check: node cli/forma/dist/index.js project-check examples/review-diff-agent && node cli/forma/dist/index.js project-check examples/review-diff-agent --json && vitest run --config examples/vitest.config.ts examples/review-diff-agent/test/review_diff_package_lock.test.ts && PYTHONPATH=packages/forma-python/src python examples/review-diff-agent/test/review_diff_package_lock_smoke.py && corepack pnpm projects:installed-smoke
scripts.proof:migration: vitest run --config examples/vitest.config.ts examples/review_diff_migration.test.ts && PYTHONPATH=examples python examples/review_diff_migration_test.py
scripts.proof:release: node cli/forma/dist/index.js package-review examples/review_diff.forma.pkg.json --proof-command "corepack pnpm proof:migration && corepack pnpm projects:check && corepack pnpm packages:installed-smoke"
